finding: No machine-readable output (--json/--format) on any command; ocman consumes opencode JSON but emits none, so it cannot be scripted downstream.
proposed_action: Add --json to read/report commands with a documented, semi-stable schema; keep human output default.

finding: ocman spend (per-project/session spend incl. historical) is a named backlog item with real demand; cost is only in db info/models/compaction; db info --by-project shows disk only.
evidence: TODO.md:5-28; cli.py:10687-10721 usage metrics; cli.py:10488 _per_project_disk_usage (no cost)
proposed_action: Implement ocman spend per backlog (per-project default, session detail, live vs historical toggle; forked-dedupe deferred).

finding: Top-level export help says project export is not yet supported, but project export IS wired and works.
proposed_action: Correct the export help text to state project export is supported (auto-detected).

finding: Top-level move sugar lacks --confirm-remote-delete/-y/--force that session move and project move have; remote guarded-delete unreachable via sugar.
proposed_action: Add the three flags to the top-level move sugar and thread into _execute_move.

finding: -y/--yes (skip typed confirm) missing on project delete, db clean, db clean-orphans, backup clean; cannot run unattended/scripted.
proposed_action: Add -y/--yes to those commands via the confirm_destructive assume_yes seam.

finding: --force means bypass process-lock on all DB/delete/move ops but skip the confirmation prompt on history clear.
proposed_action: Disambiguate: keep --force back-compat on history clear but document it; converge confirm-skip on -y.

finding: --dry-run absent on move, backup restore, session import, history clear (all mutate state; no preview).
evidence: dry-run present 5794/5831/5703/5857; absent move 5812-5843, restore 5875, import 5803, history clear 5885
proposed_action: Add --dry-run to move and import; defer restore/history-clear preview (see deferred).

finding: No --limit/pagination on session list/project list/history show; db info top-models hardcoded LIMIT 3.
evidence: search -n 5682; no limit on list/history; db info LIMIT 3 cli.py:10707
proposed_action: Add --limit N with a showing-N-of-M note; parametrize db info top-models.
